assertion_results.text: Description includes a Motivation section explaining WHY the refactor was needed (inconsistent queries, no connection pooling, duplicated SQL)
assertion_results.evidence: No motivation section. States what was done but not why.

assertion_results.text: Description includes performance numbers (45ms to 12ms or similar improvement metrics)
assertion_results.evidence: Notes: 'This improves query performance from ~45ms to ~12ms due to connection pooling'

assertion_results.text: Description includes a Changes section that groups the 18 file changes by concept (repository layer, pooling, error handling, service migration) not file-by-file
assertion_results.evidence: 18 individual file paths listed with no grouping

assertion_results.text: Description includes a Testing Instructions section with steps to verify no behavioral regression (e.g., running existing test suite, comparing API responses)
assertion_results.evidence: Says 'Run npm test to make sure nothing is broken' — single generic command

assertion_results.text: Description includes a Rollback Plan that addresses the complexity of reverting a 18-file refactor
Description includes a Reviewer Notes section guiding reviewers on what to focus on in a large refactor
Testing instructions include a way to verify the performance improvement (query timing, connection pool stats, or load test)
Rollback plan is substantive (not just 'revert the PR') — addresses whether partial rollback is possible or if it's all-or-nothing
